parsed.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 3: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 4: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
Speaker 4: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 5: Specter One, report.
Speaker 6: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 3: This isn't real.
Speaker 4: The hell it ain't!
Speaker 8: Master! Master! Where's the dreams that I've been after? Master! Master! You promised only lies!
Speaker 4: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to lead, are we?
Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 1: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 4: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 8: Obey your master!
Speaker 9: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

auditTrail.detail: Merged the boundary fragment 'Raul Menendez ignited global unrest...' with the continuation 'on an unprecedented scale.' into one sentence.
Kept consistent speaker labels in the form 'Speaker N' across all chunks.
Excluded final chunk because it contained no speech.

debug.notes: Cleaned punctuation and stitched one cross-chunk sentence boundary between chunks 0 and 1. No invented dialogue; song lyric and promotional line retained as transcribed.

stitch.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 3: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 4: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
Speaker 4: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 5: Specter One, report.
Speaker 6: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 3: This isn't real.
Speaker 4: The hell it ain't!
Speaker 8: Master! Master! Where's the dreams that I've been after? Master! Master! You promised only lies!
Speaker 4: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to lead, are we?
Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 1: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 4: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 8: Obey your master!
Speaker 9: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.
